svg.text: Eight of the twelve third-placed teams advance. Five are already in; the rest is a
goal-difference scrap between the sides below, with six games left to play.
the easiest the bar can get
the hardest the bar can get
Goal difference of the last qualifying third across every simulated finish (it is 3 points in every run).
THE RACE FOR THE LAST SPOTS
Gold = already through as a top-eight third. Teal = on the bubble: chance to qualify across 1,000,000 simulated finishes, sorted most to least likely.
Rows above the gold line are the projected top eight. Eliminated sides are not shown.
The bounds are exact; the chances and the curve are from the simulations.
